# console / device mode

_status: stable · owner: core · id: `device.mode`_

## the one command

```
hosaka mode device
```

## why you care

one command flips the whole personality of the box.

## what it does

Switch the pi between console (server) and device (kiosk) modes.

## commands

- `hosaka mode console`
- `hosaka mode device`

## entrypoints

- `POST /api/v1/mode`
